```json
{
  "communicative_function": "Expressing a philosophical view on the relationship between a person and time",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "The past and future are not within one's immediate control.",
    "It is not possible to change or give up past events or future potentialities."
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent, as it assumes a consistent view of time as immutable and outside of personal dominion.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "Useful if one adopts a philosophy or mindset that focuses on present actions and decisions, acknowledging the unalterable nature of the past and future.",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "Misleading if interpreted as implying that one's current actions have no impact on future outcomes, or if it leads to resignation or inaction regarding future planning."
}
```
